Home.title: your teacher?
Home.subtitle: RateMinistère fan? Join us and make it official!
Home.p1: We are the <special>first</special> and <special>only</special> platform developed by two high school students in Canada to revolutionize teacher and school ratings with sleek design, organized tools, and detailed classifications.
Home.p2-1: We use <special>strict</special> <special>guidelines</special> and <special>advanced</special> <special>algorithms</special> to ensure that only constructive and respectful comments are published, while banning inappropriate or harmful feedback. We are setting the standard for <special>reliable</special> and <special>innovative</special> educational platforms.

errorMessages: Oops, our bad! This one's totally on us, not you.
Yikes, that's on us! Don't worry about it.
Whoops, our mistake! We've got it covered.
Our fault, not yours. We'll get this sorted!
Sorry about that! It's on us, not you.
Uh-oh, that's our blunder. Hang tight, we'll fix it.
Well, that's embarrassing—our error, not yours.
This one's on us. Apologies for the slip-up!
Our mistake here, no stress on your end.
We dropped the ball on this one, but we've got it.
noResultsMessages: Despite our best efforts, we couldn't dig up anything for '{query}'.
Alas, even our deepest dives into the data trenches came up empty for '{query}'.
We scoured the internet and found zilch for '{query}'.
Our search wizards couldn't conjure up anything for '{query}'.
Sorry, but '{query}' remains a mystery to us.
We hunted high and low, but nothing for '{query}' was found.
Our search elves came up empty for '{query}'.
It seems '{query}' is hiding from us.
loadingMessages: Digging deep at 3,1415km/s for the best results...
Traveling through space to gather information...
Racing against the clock to get this done...
Riding the waves of data to bring you the best...
Exploring digital landscapes for hidden gems...
Uncovering hidden treasures just for you...
Navigating through code like a pro...
Venturing into the unknown to find what you need...
Climbing the information peak to get there...
Gathering all the bits and bytes just for you...

guidelines.title: RateMinistère Official Site Guidelines
guidelines.preamble: RateMinistère is an online platform dedicated to providing a secure and constructive environment for students to share educational experiences and insights regarding educators.

scopeOfParticipation.title: Scope of Participation
points: Comments must be submitted exclusively by students who:
Are currently enrolled in the specific course.
Users are permitted one (1) comment per course.
Feedback must be grounded in personal, first-hand experience.

strictlyForbidden.title: Strictly Forbidden Submissions:
points: References to familial or personal circumstances.

moderationProtocol.title: Moderation Protocol
moderationProtocol.contentEvaluation: Advanced algorithmic systems will comprehensively review all submissions. Comments contravening established guidelines will be systematically flagged for immediate review.

infractions.description: One-week suspension of commenting privileges. Reinstatement following 30 days of compliant behavior.
One-month suspension of commenting privileges. Reinstatement following 90 days of compliant behavior.
Three-month suspension of commenting privileges. Reinstatement following 365 days of compliant behavior.

moderationProtocol.reviewMechanism: Users may submit formal appeals through designated review channels. Independent evaluation of potential moderation discrepancies will be conducted.

acceptableCommentary.title: Acceptable Commentary Characteristics
points: Focus on educational experience and pedagogical effectiveness.
Balanced perspective supporting informed academic decision-making.

consequences.title: Consequences of Non-Compliance
consequences.content: Persistent violation of established guidelines may result in permanent account termination.

legalReservation.title: Legal Reservation of Rights
legalReservation.content: RateMinistère reserves comprehensive discretion to modify guidelines and implement appropriate actions to maintain platform integrity and user experience.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: These guidelines are provided for informational purposes and do not constitute legal counsel. Users are encouraged to exercise discretion and professional judgment when submitting commentary.

introduction.paragraph1: This Cookie Policy explains how RateMinistère ("Company," "we," "us," and "our") uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website at
introduction.paragraph1-1: . It explains what these technologies are and why we use them, as well as your rights to control our use of them.
introduction.paragraph2: In some cases we may use cookies to collect personal information, or that becomes personal information if we combine it with other information.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.paragraph1: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.
whatAreCookies.paragraph2: Cookies set by the website owner (in this case, RateMinistère) are called "first-party cookies." Cookies set by parties other than the website owner are called "third-party cookies." Third-party cookies enable third-party features or functionality to be provided on or through the website (e.g., advertising, interactive content, and analytics). The parties that set these third-party cookies can recognize your computer both when it visits the website in question and also when it visits certain other websites.

whyUseCookies.title: Why do we use cookies?
whyUseCookies.paragraph: We use first- and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Website to operate, and we refer to these as "essential" or "strictly necessary" cookies. Other cookies also enable us to track and target the interests of our users to enhance the experience on our Online Properties. Third parties serve cookies through our Website for advertising, analytics, and other purposes. This is described in more detail below.

controlCookies.title: How can I control cookies?
controlCookies.paragraph1: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie rights by setting your preferences in the Cookie Consent Manager. The Cookie Consent Manager allows you to select which categories of cookies you accept or reject. Essential cookies cannot be rejected as they are strictly necessary to provide you with services.
controlCookies.paragraph2: The Cookie Consent Manager can be found in the notification banner and on our Website. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our Website though your access to some functionality and areas of our Website may be restricted. You may also set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies.

cookieTable.title: Cookie Types
cookieTable.description: The specific types of first- and third-party cookies served through our Website and the purposes they perform are described in the table below.

browserControl.title: How can I control cookies on my browser?
browserControl.paragraph: As the means by which you can refuse cookies through your web browser controls vary from browser to browser, you should visit your browser's help menu for more information.

otherTrackingTechnologies.title: What about other tracking technologies, like web beacons?
otherTrackingTechnologies.paragraph1: Cookies are not the only way to recognize or track visitors to a website. We may use other, similar technologies from time to time, like web beacons (sometimes called "tracking pixels" or "clear gifs"). These are tiny graphics files that contain a unique identifier that enables us to recognize when someone has visited our Website or opened an email including them.
otherTrackingTechnologies.paragraph2: This allows us, for example, to monitor the traffic patterns of users from one page within a website to another, to deliver or communicate with cookies, to understand whether you have come to the website from an online advertisement displayed on a third-party website, to improve site performance, and to measure the success of email marketing campaigns.
otherTrackingTechnologies.paragraph3: In many instances, these technologies are reliant on cookies to function properly, and so declining cookies will impair their functioning.

flashCookies.title: Do you use Flash cookies or Local Shared Objects?
flashCookies.paragraph1: Websites may also use so-called "Flash Cookies" (also known as Local Shared Objects or "LSOs") to, among other things, collect and store information about your use of our services, fraud prevention, and for other site operations.
flashCookies.paragraph2: If you do not want Flash Cookies stored on your computer, you can adjust the settings of your Flash player to block Flash Cookies storage using the tools contained in the Website Storage Settings Panel.
flashCookies.paragraph3: Please note that setting the Flash Player to restrict or limit acceptance of Flash Cookies may reduce or impede the functionality of some Flash applications, including, potentially, Flash applications used in connection with our services or online content.

targetedAdvertising.title: Do you serve targeted advertising?
targetedAdvertising.paragraph: Third parties may serve cookies on your computer or mobile device to serve advertising through our Website. These companies may use information about your visits to this and other websites in order to provide relevant advertisements about goods and services that you may be interested in.

policyUpdates.title: How often will you update this Cookie Policy?
policyUpdates.paragraph1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time in order to reflect, for example, changes to the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.
policyUpdates.paragraph2: Please therefore revisit this Cookie Policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies and related technologies.
policyUpdates.paragraph3: The date at the top of this Cookie Policy indicates when it was last updated.

contact.title: Where can I get further information?
contact.description: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other technologies, please contact us at:

privacyPolicy.title: PRIVACY POLICY

introduction.paragraph1: This Privacy Notice for RateMinistère.inc ("we," "us," or "our"), describes how and why we might access, collect, store, use, and/or share ("process") your personal information when you use our services ("Services"), including when you:
introduction.listItem1.1: or any website of ours that links to this Privacy Notice
introduction.listItem2: Download and use our mobile application (RateMinistère), or any other application of ours that links to this Privacy Notice
introduction.listItem3: Use RateMinistère. We are a platform revolutionizing teacher and school ratings. In ordre to help every student to reach a higher grade, we use strict guidelines and advanced algorithms to ensure only constructive and respectful comments are published.
introduction.listItem4: Engage with us in other related ways, including any sales, marketing, or events

privacyPolicy.questionsConcerns: Questions or concerns? Reading this Privacy Notice will help you understand your privacy rights and choices. We are responsible for making decisions about how your personal information is processed. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services. If you still have any questions or concerns, please contact us at

summary.title: SUMMARY OF KEY POINTS
summary.description: This summary provides key points from our Privacy Notice, but you can find out more details about any of these topics by clicking the link following each key point or by using our table of contents below.
summary.keyPoint1: What personal information do we process?
summary.keyPoint2: Do we process any sensitive personal information?
summary.keyPoint3: Do we collect any information from third parties?
summary.keyPoint4: How do we process your information?
summary.keyPoint5: In what situations and with which parties do we share personal information?
summary.keyPoint6: How do we keep your information safe?
summary.keyPoint8: How do you exercise your rights?

tableOfContents.title: TABLE OF CONTENTS
tableOfContents.item2: HOW DO WE PROCESS YOUR INFORMATION?
tableOfContents.item3: WHAT LEGAL BASES DO WE RELY ON TO PROCESS YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?
tableOfContents.item4: WHEN AND WITH WHOM DO WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?
tableOfContents.item5: WHAT IS OUR STANCE ON THIRD-PARTY WEBSITES?

tableOfContents.item10: HOW DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION SAFE?
tableOfContents.item13: DO WE MAKE UPDATES TO THIS NOTICE?
tableOfContents.item14: HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?
tableOfContents.item15: HOW CAN YOU REVIEW, UPDATE, OR DELETE THE DATA WE COLLECT FROM YOU?

personalInformation.title: Personal information you disclose to us
personalInformation.short: In Short: We collect personal information that you provide to us.
personalInformation.details: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the Services, express an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and Services, when you participate in activities on the Services, or otherwise when you contact us.

paymentData.title: Payment Data
paymentData.details: We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you choose to make purchases, such as your payment instrument number, and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is handled and stored by E-Transfer, MasterCard, Visa and American Express. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here:

socialMediaLoginData.title: Social Media Login Data
socialMediaLoginData.details: We may provide you with the option to register with us using your existing social media account details, like your Facebook, X, or other social media account. If you choose to register in this way, we will collect certain profile information about you from the social media provider, as described in the section called "HOW DO WE HANDLE YOUR SOCIAL LOGINS?" below.

applicationData.title: Application Data
applicationData.geolocation: Geolocation Information: We may request access or permission to track location-based information from your mobile device, either continuously or while you are using our mobile application(s), to provide certain location-based services. If you wish to change our access or permissions, you may do so in your device's settings.
applicationData.mobileDeviceAccess: Mobile Device Access: We may request access or permission to certain features from your mobile device, including your mobile device's camera, microphone, calendar, social media accounts, and other features. If you wish to change our access or permissions, you may do so in your device's settings.
applicationData.mobileDeviceData: Mobile Device Data: We automatically collect device information (such as your mobile device ID, model, and manufacturer), operating system, version information and system configuration information, device and application identification numbers, browser type and version, hardware model Internet service provider and/or mobile carrier, and Internet Protocol (IP) address (or proxy server). If you are using our application(s), we may also collect information about the phone network associated with your mobile device, your mobile device’s operating system or platform, the type of mobile device you use, your mobile device’s unique device ID, and information about the features of our application(s) you accessed.
applicationData.pushNotifications: Push Notifications: We may request to send you push notifications regarding your account or certain features of the application(s). If you wish to opt out from receiving these types of communications, you may turn them off in your device's settings.
applicationData.usage: This information is primarily needed to maintain the security and operation of our application(s), for troubleshooting, and for our internal analytics and reporting purposes.

automaticallyCollected.title: Information automatically collected
automaticallyCollected.short: In Short: Some information — such as your Internet Protocol (IP) address and/or browser and device characteristics — is collected automatically when you visit our Services.
automaticallyCollected.details: We automatically collect certain information when you visit, use, or navigate the Services. This information does not reveal your specific identity (like your name or contact information) but may include device and usage information, such as your IP address, browser and device characteristics, operating system, language preferences, referring URLs, device name, country, location, information about how and when you use our Services, and other technical information. This information is primarily needed to maintain the security and operation of our Services, and for our internal analytics and reporting purposes.
automaticallyCollected.cookies: Like many businesses, we also collect information through cookies and similar technologies. You can find out more about this in our Cookie Notice:

logAndUsageData.title: Log and Usage Data
logAndUsageData.details: Log and usage data is service-related, diagnostic, usage, and performance information our servers automatically collect when you access or use our Services and which we record in log files. Depending on how you interact with us, this log data may include your IP address, device information, browser type, and settings and information about your activity in the Services (such as the date/time stamps associated with your usage, pages and files viewed, searches, and other actions you take such as which features you use), device event information (such as system activity, error reports (sometimes called "crash dumps"), and hardware settings).

deviceData.title: Device Data
deviceData.details: We collect device data such as information about your computer, phone, tablet, or other device you use to access the Services. Depending on the device used, this device data may include information such as your IP address (or proxy server), device and application identification numbers, location, browser type, hardware model, Internet service provider and/or mobile carrier, operating system, and system configuration information.

locationData.title: Location Data
locationData.details: We collect location data such as information about your device's location, which can be either precise or imprecise. How much information we collect depends on the type and settings of the device you use to access the Services. For example, we may use GPS and other technologies to collect geolocation data that tells us your current location (based on your IP address). You can opt out of allowing us to collect this information either by refusing access to the information or by disabling your Location setting on your device. However, if you choose to opt out, you may not be able to use certain aspects of the Services.

googleAPI.title: Google API
googleAPI.details: Our use of information received from Google APIs will adhere to

informationFromOtherSources.title: Information collected from other sources
informationFromOtherSources.short: In Short: We may collect limited data from public databases, marketing partners, social media platforms, and other outside sources.
informationFromOtherSources.details: In order to enhance our ability to provide relevant marketing, offers, and services to you and update our records, we may obtain information about you from other sources, such as public databases, joint marketing partners, affiliate programs, data providers, social media platforms, and from other third parties. This information includes mailing addresses, job titles, email addresses, phone numbers, intent data (or user behavior data), Internet Protocol (IP) addresses, social media profiles, social media URLs, and custom profiles, for purposes of targeted advertising and event promotion.
informationFromOtherSources.socialMediaDetails: If you interact with us on a social media platform using your social media account (e.g., Facebook or X), we receive personal information about you from such platforms such as your name, email address, and gender. You may have the right to withdraw your consent to processing your personal information. Learn more about withdrawing your consent. Any personal information that we collect from your social media account depends on your social media account's privacy settings. Please note that their own use of your information is not governed by this Privacy Notice.

howWeProcess.title: 2. HOW DO WE PROCESS YOUR INFORMATION?
howWeProcess.short: In Short: We process your information to provide, improve, and administer our Services, communicate with you, for security and fraud prevention, and to comply with law. We may also process your information for other purposes with your consent.
howWeProcess.accountManagement: To facilitate account creation and authentication and otherwise manage user accounts. We may process your information so you can create and log in to your account, as well as keep your account in working order.
howWeProcess.serviceDelivery: To deliver and facilitate delivery of services to the user. We may process your information to provide you with the requested service.
howWeProcess.userSupport: To respond to user inquiries/offer support to users. We may process your information to respond to your inquiries and solve any potential issues you might have with the requested service.
howWeProcess.administrativeInfo: To send administrative information to you. We may process your information to send you details about our products and services, changes to our terms and policies, and other similar information.
howWeProcess.orderManagement: To fulfill and manage your orders. We may process your information to fulfill and manage your orders, payments, returns, and exchanges made through the Services.
howWeProcess.userCommunication: To enable user-to-user communications. We may process your information if you choose to use any of our offerings that allow for communication with another user.
howWeProcess.feedback: To request feedback. We may process your information when necessary to request feedback and to contact you about your use of our Services.
howWeProcess.marketing: To send you marketing and promotional communications. We may process the personal information you send to us for our marketing purposes, if this is in accordance with your marketing preferences. You can opt out of our marketing emails at any time. For more information, see "WHAT ARE YOUR PRIVACY RIGHTS?" below.
howWeProcess.targetedAdvertising: To deliver targeted advertising to you. We may process your information to develop and display personalized content and advertising tailored to your interests, location, and more. For more information see our Cookie Notice:
howWeProcess.testimonials: To post testimonials. We post testimonials on our Services that may contain personal information.
howWeProcess.security: To protect our Services. We may process your information as part of our efforts to keep our Services safe and secure, including fraud monitoring and prevention.
howWeProcess.prizeDraws: To administer prize draws and competitions. We may process your information to administer prize draws and competitions.
howWeProcess.evaluation: To evaluate and improve our Services, products, marketing, and your experience. We may process your information when we believe it is necessary to identify usage trends, determine the effectiveness of our promotional campaigns, and to evaluate and improve our Services, products, marketing, and your experience.
howWeProcess.marketingEffectiveness: To determine the effectiveness of our marketing and promotional campaigns. We may process your information to better understand how to provide marketing and promotional campaigns that are most relevant to you.
howWeProcess.legalObligations: To comply with our legal obligations. We may process your information to comply with our legal obligations, respond to legal requests, and exercise, establish, or defend our legal rights.

legalBases.title: 3. WHAT LEGAL BASES DO WE RELY ON TO PROCESS YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?
legalBases.short: In Short: We only process your personal information when we believe it is necessary and we have a valid legal reason (i.e., legal basis) to do so under applicable law, like with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services to enter into or fulfill our contractual obligations, to protect your rights, or to fulfill our legitimate business interests.
legalBases.permission: We may process your information if you have given us specific permission (i.e., express consent) to use your personal information for a specific purpose, or in situations where your permission can be inferred (i.e., implied consent). You can withdraw your consent at any time.

sharingInformation.title: 4. WHEN AND WITH WHOM DO WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?
sharingInformation.short: In Short: We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with the following third parties.
sharingInformation.thirdParties: Vendors, Consultants, and Other Third-Party Service Providers. We may share your data with third-party vendors, service providers, contractors, or agents ("third parties") who perform services for us or on our behalf and require access to such information to do that work. We have contracts in place with our third parties, which are designed to help safeguard your personal information. This means that they cannot do anything with your personal information unless we have instructed them to do it. They will also not share your personal information with any organization apart from us. They also commit to protect the data they hold on our behalf and to retain it for the period we instruct.
sharingInformation.vendors: Advertising, Direct Marketing, and Lead Generation: Google AdSense
sharingInformation.allowUsersToConnect: Allow Users to Connect to Their Third-Party Accounts: Google account and Microsoft account
sharingInformation.cloudServices: Cloud Computing Services: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
sharingInformation.communication: Communicate and Chat with Users: discourse
sharingInformation.socialMedia: Social Media Sharing and Advertising: YouTube social plugins
sharingInformation.userAccountRegistration: User Account Registration and Authentication: Google OAuth 2.0, Google Sign-In, Microsoft Sign-in and Microsoft OAuth 2.0
sharingInformation.analytics: Web and Mobile Analytics: Google Ads and Google Analytics
situations: Business Transfers. We may share or transfer your information in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business to another company.

Affiliates. We may share your information with our affiliates, in which case we will require those affiliates to honor this Privacy Notice. Affiliates include our parent company and any subsidiaries, joint venture partners, or other companies that we control or that are under common control with us.
Business Partners. We may share your information with our business partners to offer you certain products, services, or promotions.

Offer Wall. Our application(s) may display a third-party hosted "offer wall." Such an offer wall allows third-party advertisers to offer virtual currency, gifts, or other items to users in return for the acceptance and completion of an advertisement offer. Such an offer wall may appear in our application(s) and be displayed to you based on certain data, such as your geographic area or demographic information. When you click on an offer wall, you will be brought to an external website belonging to other persons and will leave our application(s). A unique identifier, such as your user ID, will be shared with the offer wall provider in order to prevent fraud and properly credit your account with the relevant reward.

thirdPartyWebsites.title: 5. WHAT IS OUR STANCE ON THIRD-PARTY WEBSITES?
thirdPartyWebsites.short: In Short: We are not responsible for the safety of any information that you share with third parties that we may link to or who advertise on our Services, but are not affiliated with, our Services.

cookies.title: 6. DO WE USE COOKIES AND OTHER TRACKING TECHNOLOGIES?
cookies.short: In Short: We may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect and store your information.
cookies.details: We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies (like web beacons and pixels) to gather information when you interact with our Services. Some online tracking technologies help us maintain the security of our Services and your account, prevent crashes, fix bugs, save your preferences, and assist with basic site functions.
cookies.thirdPartyCookies: We also permit third parties and service providers to use online tracking technologies on our Services for analytics and advertising, including to help manage and display advertisements, to tailor advertisements to your interests, or to send abandoned shopping cart reminders (depending on your communication preferences). The third parties and service providers use their technology to provide advertising about products and services tailored to your interests which may appear either on our Services or on other websites.
cookies.cookieNotice: Specific information about how we use such technologies and how you can refuse certain cookies is set out in our Cookie Notice:

googleAnalytics.title: Google Analytics
googleAnalytics.details: We may share your information with Google Analytics to track and analyze the use of the Services. The Google Analytics Advertising Features that we may use include: Google Analytics Demographics and Interests Reporting. To opt out of being tracked by Google Analytics across the Services, visit
googleAnalytics.details-1: . You can opt out of Google Analytics Advertising Features through Ads Settings and Ad Settings for mobile apps. Other opt out means include
googleAnalytics.details-3: . For more information on the privacy practices of Google, please visit the

aiProducts.title: 7. DO WE OFFER ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE-BASED PRODUCTS?
aiProducts.short: In Short: We offer products, features, or tools powered by artificial intelligence, machine learning, or similar technologies.
aiProducts.details: As part of our Services, we offer products, features, or tools powered by artificial intelligence, machine learning, or similar technologies (collectively, "AI Products"). These tools are designed to enhance your experience and provide you with innovative solutions. The terms in this Privacy Notice govern your use of the AI Products within our Services.

useOfAITechnologies.title: Use of AI Technologies
useOfAITechnologies.details: We provide the AI Products through third-party service providers ("AI Service Providers"), including Groq. As outlined in this Privacy Notice, your input, output, and personal information will be shared with and processed by these AI Service Providers to enable your use of our AI Products for purposes outlined in "WHEN AND WITH WHOM DO WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?" You must not use the AI Products in any way that violates the terms or policies of any AI Service Provider.

ourAIProducts.title: Our AI Products
ourAIProducts.details: Our AI Products are designed for the following functions:

howWeProcessDataUsingAI.title: How We Process Your Data Using AI
howWeProcessDataUsingAI.details: All personal information processed using our AI Products is handled in line with our Privacy Notice and our agreement with third parties. This ensures high security and safeguards your personal information throughout the process, giving you peace of mind about your data’s safety.

socialLogins.title: 8. HOW DO WE HANDLE YOUR SOCIAL LOGINS?
socialLogins.short: In Short: If you choose to register or log in to our Services using a social media account, we may have access to certain information about you.
socialLogins.details: Our Services offer you the ability to register and log in using your third-party social media account details (like your Facebook or X logins). Where you choose to do this, we will receive certain profile information about you from your social media provider. The profile information we receive may vary depending on the social media provider concerned, but will often include your name, email address, friends list, and profile picture, as well as other information you choose to make public on such a social media platform.
socialLogins.socialMediaProvider: We will use the information we receive only for the purposes that are described in this Privacy Notice or that are otherwise made clear to you on the relevant Services. Please note that we do not control, and are not responsible for, other uses of your personal information by your third-party social media provider. We recommend that you review their privacy notice to understand how they collect, use, and share your personal information, and how you can set your privacy preferences on their sites and apps.

dataRetention.title: 9. HOW LONG DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION?
dataRetention.short: In Short: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Notice unless otherwise required by law.
dataRetention.details: We will only keep your personal information for as long as it is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Notice, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law (such as tax, accounting, or other legal requirements). No purpose in this notice will require us keeping your personal information for longer than six (6) months past the termination of the user’s account.
dataRetention.deletion: When we have no ongoing legitimate business need to process your personal information, we will either delete or anonymize such information, or, if this is not possible (for example, because your personal information has been stored in backup archives), then we will securely store your personal information and isolate it from any further processing until deletion is possible.

dataSecurity.title: 10. HOW DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION SAFE?
dataSecurity.short: In Short: We aim to protect your personal information through a system of organizational and technical security measures.
dataSecurity.details: We have implemented appropriate and reasonable technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the security of any personal information we process. However, despite our safeguards and efforts to secure your information, no electronic transmission over the Internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure, so we cannot promise or guarantee that hackers, cybercriminals, or other unauthorized third parties will not be able to defeat our security and improperly collect, access, steal, or modify your information. Although we will do our best to protect your personal information, transmission of personal information to and from our Services is at your own risk. You should only access the Services within a secure environment.

privacyRights.title: 11. WHAT ARE YOUR PRIVACY RIGHTS?
privacyRights.short: In Short: In some regions, such as Canada, you have rights that allow you greater access to and control over your personal information. You may review, change, or terminate your account at any time, depending on your country, province, or state of residence.
privacyRights.details: In some regions (like Canada), you have certain rights under applicable data protection laws. These may include the right (i) to request access and obtain a copy of your personal information, (ii) to request rectification or erasure; (iii) to restrict the processing of your personal information; (iv) if applicable, to data portability; and (v) not to be subject to automated decision-making. In certain circumstances, you may also have the right to object to the processing of your personal information. You can make such a request by contacting us by using the contact details provided in the section "HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?" below.
privacyRights.consideration: We will consider and act upon any request in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

withdrawingConsent.title: Withdrawing your consent:
withdrawingConsent.details: If we are relying on your consent to process your personal information, which may be express and/or implied consent depending on the applicable law, you have the right to withdraw your consent at any time. You can withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us by using the contact details provided in the section "HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?" below.
withdrawingConsent.limitations: However, please note that this will not affect the lawfulness of the processing before its withdrawal nor, when applicable law allows, will it affect the processing of your personal information conducted in reliance on lawful processing grounds other than consent.

accountInformation.title: Account Information
accountInformation.details: If you would at any time like to review or change the information in your account or terminate your account, you can:
options: Log in to your account settings and update your user account.

Upon your request to terminate your account, we will deactivate or delete your account and information from our active databases. However, we may retain some information in our files to prevent fraud, troubleshoot problems, assist with any investigations, enforce our legal terms and/or comply with applicable legal requirements.

cookiesAndSimilarTechnologies.title: Cookies and similar technologies:
cookiesAndSimilarTechnologies.details: Most Web browsers are set to accept cookies by default. If you prefer, you can usually choose to set your browser to remove cookies and to reject cookies. If you choose to remove cookies or reject cookies, this could affect certain features or services of our Services. You may also opt out of interest-based advertising by advertisers on our Services. For further information, please see our Cookie Notice:
cookiesAndSimilarTechnologies.question: If you have questions or comments about your privacy rights, you may email us at

doNotTrack.title: 12. CONTROLS FOR DO-NOT-TRACK FEATURES
doNotTrack.short: Most web browsers and some mobile operating systems and mobile applications include a Do-Not-Track ("DNT") feature or setting you can activate to signal your privacy preference not to have data about your online browsing activities monitored and collected. At this stage, no uniform technology standard for recognizing and implementing DNT signals has been finalized. As such, we do not currently respond to DNT browser signals or any other mechanism that automatically communicates your choice not to be tracked online. If a standard for online tracking is adopted that we must follow in the future, we will inform you about that practice in a revised version of this Privacy Notice.

updates.title: 13. DO WE MAKE UPDATES TO THIS NOTICE?
updates.short: In Short: Yes, we will update this notice as necessary to stay compliant with relevant laws.
updates.details: We may update this Privacy Notice from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by an updated "Revised" date at the top of this Privacy Notice. If we make material changes to this Privacy Notice, we may notify you either by prominently posting a notice of such changes or by directly sending you a notification. We encourage you to review this Privacy Notice frequently to be informed of how we are protecting your information.

contact.title: 14. HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?
contact.description: If you have questions or comments about this notice, you may email us at rateministere@gmail.com or contact us by post at:

reviewUpdateDelete.title: 15. HOW CAN YOU REVIEW, UPDATE, OR DELETE THE DATA WE COLLECT FROM YOU?
reviewUpdateDelete.short: Based on the applicable laws of your country, you may have the right to request access to the personal information we collect from you, details about how we have processed it, correct inaccuracies, or delete your personal information. You may also have the right to withdraw your consent to our processing of your personal information. These rights may be limited in some circumstances by applicable law. To request to review, update, or delete your personal information, please fill out and submit a data subject access request.

AstrAlumnaGuidelines.title: AstrAlumna Community Guidelines
AstrAlumnaGuidelines.intro: Welcome to AstrAlumna, a friendly and respectful space for exchange dedicated to the academic community. Our goal is to create an environment where everyone feels comfortable sharing their knowledge, asking questions, and interacting constructively.
AstrAlumnaGuidelines.philosophy: Please treat this forum with the same respect you would give to a public space. We are a shared community resource - a place to exchange knowledge, skills, and interests through dialogue.

improveDiscussion.title: Improving Discussions
improveDiscussion.desc: Help us maintain high-quality discussions by always contributing positively, even if your contribution seems small. If you are unsure whether your message adds value to the conversation, take the time to reflect and try again later.
improveDiscussion.browse: Take the time to browse existing topics before replying or starting a new discussion thread. This will allow you to better understand the topics being addressed and meet other members who share your interests.
improveDiscussion.positive: Ensure your message adds value to the discussion and contributes constructively to the exchange.
improveDiscussion.relevance: Keep discussions focused on academic topics and ensure your contributions are relevant to the theme of the discussion thread.

agreeable.title: Respect in Disagreements
agreeable.desc: It is normal to express disagreement. However, please criticize ideas, not people. Adopt a respectful and constructive tone, even when you disagree with what is being said.

avoid.adHominem: Ad hominem arguments (attacking the person rather than their arguments)
avoid.toneResponses: Responses based on the tone of the message rather than its content

agreeable.betterDesc: Favor constructive criticism of ideas. Offer well-supported arguments and counter-arguments to enrich the discussion.

yourParticipationCounts.title: Your Participation Matters
yourParticipationCounts.desc: Each interaction contributes to the overall atmosphere of the forum. By choosing to participate in enriching discussions and avoiding negative behaviors, you help make this forum a pleasant and stimulating space for exchange.
yourParticipationCounts.tools: Use the tools available to you (favorites, likes, reports, replies, edits) to improve your experience and that of other members.

ifYouSeeAProblem.title: If You See a Problem, Report It
ifYouSeeAProblem.desc: Moderators are here to ensure the forum runs smoothly, but your help is invaluable. If you observe inappropriate behavior, do not respond directly to the user involved. Use the reporting function to alert moderators.
ifYouSeeAProblem.moderators: Moderators reserve the right to remove any content and any user account deemed inappropriate, at any time and for any reason. Moderators do not preview new messages and are not responsible for the content posted by the community.

alwaysBeCivil.title: Always Be Respectful
alwaysBeCivil.desc: Politeness and respect are essential for healthy and constructive exchanges.

rules.beCivil: Be courteous and respectful in your interactions.
rules.keepItClean: Do not use obscene or sexually explicit language.
rules.respectEachOther: Do not harass, bully, or disclose private information about other members.
rules.respectForum: Do not post spam or vandalize the forum.

alwaysBeCivil.publicForum: This forum is public and indexed by search engines. Ensure that the content you post is appropriate for a wide audience.

keepItTidy.title: Keep the Forum Organized
keepItTidy.desc: To facilitate navigation and searching, please post your messages in the correct category.

rules.rightCategory: Choose the most appropriate category for your topic.
rules.noCrossPosting: Do not post the same message in multiple topics.
rules.stayOnTopic: Do not deviate from the initial topic during discussions.
rules.noSignatures: It is not necessary to sign your messages, as your profile information is already associated with them.

alternatives.plusOne: Use the "Like" button instead of replying "+1" or "Okay".
alternatives.newTopic: To address a different topic, use the "Reply as linked topic" function.

postOnlyYourOwnStuff.title: Post Only Your Own Content
postOnlyYourOwnStuff.desc: Respect copyright and intellectual property. Do not post content belonging to someone else without their permission.

poweredByYou.title: A Forum Powered by You
poweredByYou.desc: This forum is managed by a moderation team and by you, the community. If you have questions about how the forum works, feel free to open a new topic in the "Site Feedback" category to discuss it.
poweredByYou.contact: For any urgent questions or problems that cannot be resolved via the forum, contact the moderators.

AstrAlumnaGuidelines.moderationNote: Moderators reserve the right to remove any inappropriate content at any time. Report problematic behavior rather than responding to it directly. Your help is invaluable in maintaining a healthy and respectful environment.

PointsSystem.20minutes: Whoah! You stayed active for 20 minutes! 🎉

questions.3: How to navigate through all the teachers?
questions.4: How to navigate in school page?
questions.5: How to use the search bar?

answers.1: To give your feedback on a teacher, simply click on the rating button at the top right of their teacher card, or the button at the left of the teacher card detail page (accessed by clicking the teacher card). You'll be able to submit your rating using the rating icon, which is the same as our logo in the browser tab.
answers.2: To share your opinion on a school, go to the school's dedicated page. Look for the same rating button used to rate teachers (our logo).
answers.3: Browse the full list of teachers by searching for the teacher's name in the search bar. Alternatively, you can search for the desired school.  On the school page, there is a button that redirects you to the full list of teachers for that school.  Within teacher lists, you can either scroll through the list or use the search function to find a particular teacher.
answers.4: The school page is organized into several criteria containers. On desktop, hovering your mouse over each container will give you a preview of the 3 best comments, alternating between them. On mobile, holding your finger on a container will trigger the comment alternation. Clicking on a criteria container will open a modal where you can see all comments and reply to them. The large container at the bottom cycles through all comments; clicking on it will switch to the next comment. If you think some features are missing, don't hesitate to reach out to us through our Discord server or the feature recommendation button on the teacher list page.
answers.5: The search bar allows you to find specific teachers or schools.  The toggle button lets you switch between searching for teachers and schools. When the search bar is set to search for schools, a small icon appears on the right side. Clicking this icon will redirect you to a list of schools, making it easier to find the one you need.

article1.title: RateMinistère vs Rate My Professor: Similar Concept, More Features
article1.excerpt: A detailed comparison between RateMinistère and Rate My Professor, highlighting the unique features of RateMinistère.

content.value: Rate My Professor has long been a go-to resource for students looking to get the inside scoop on professors and courses.  RateMinistère takes the same core concept – community-driven ratings and reviews – and expands upon it with a wealth of additional features designed to provide a more comprehensive and user-friendly experience.

comparison.intro: This comparison table highlights the key differences between RateMinistère and Rate My Professor, demonstrating the added value and comprehensive features offered by RateMinistère.

features.label: Teacher rating
features.description: Rate teachers based on various criteria.

features.label: School rating
features.description: Rate schools based on overall experience.

features.label: Search preview
features.description: Quickly see search results as you type.

features.label: FAQ section
features.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions.

features.label: Search preview loading state
features.description: See a loading indicator while searching.

features.label: Search preview no result state
features.description: Get a clear message when no results are found.

features.label: Dynamic hover animation
features.description: Enjoy interactive hover effects.

features.label: Reduced ads
features.description: Experience up to 13 times fewer ads per page.*

features.label: School list
features.description: Find your school faster with a dedicated list.

features.label: Custom cursor
features.description: Personalize your experience with a custom cursor.

features.label: Back button
features.description: Easily navigate back with a prominent back button.

features.label: Mission explanation
features.description: Learn about our mission on the home page.

features.label: Team transparency
features.description: Meet our team and see who's behind the platform.

features.label: Easy-to-find FAQ
features.description: Quickly access the FAQ section.

features.label: Full tutorial
features.description: Get started with a comprehensive tutorial.

features.label: Contact-us section
features.description: Reach out to us easily through the contact form.

features.label: Feature recommendation
features.description: Suggest new features you'd like to see.

features.label: Tutorial explanations
features.description: Detailed explanations for each feature.

features.label: Comment replies
features.description: Engage in discussions by replying to comments.

features.label: All comments modal
features.description: Read all comments in one convenient place.

features.label: Organized comments
features.description: View comments organized by criteria on school pages.

features.label: Watch out section
features.description: Students can share important information about teachers.

features.label: AstrAlumna
features.description: A platform for student collaboration and sharing.

features.label: AstrArena
features.description: Ace math while playing a game.

comparison.disclaimer: Based on RateMinistère research team comparison
comparison.conclusion: While Rate My Professor provides a basic platform for rating professors, RateMinistère offers a significantly richer and more feature-packed experience.  From improved navigation and a cleaner interface to innovative features like AstrAlumna and AstrArena, RateMinistère is designed to be the ultimate resource for students.

topSection.text: RateMinistère : The best teacher rating platform by features

bottomSection.title: Ready to give it a try?
bottomSection.text: See for yourself! Get started with RateMinistère free and share your voice. No credit card. No commitment. Free forever.

AstrArena.big_quiz_correct_needed: Answer {correct} out of {total} questions correctly to jump.

report.success: Thank you!🎉 We will moderate this ASAP!
report.error: Oops, seem like the system went taking a break.

ReportModal.title: Report Content
ReportModal.reasonPlaceholder: Please tell us why you are reporting this content...

newFeatures: The RateMinistère website launched! It's a place where students can rate their teachers.
You can now log in using your Google account, making it safe and easy to vote.
improvements: Problems with the login page were fixed.
changelog.why: The initial launch established the core functionality: student-to-teacher rating and secure Google login for ease of use and trust.

improvements: Fixed a button that closes the section showing all comments.
Fixed how background images look on comments when viewed on a phone.
Made the slant on "5/5" comments look better.
Improved how comments are checked for appropriateness.
Made comments easier to read with a cool, slightly see-through effect.
changelog.why: These improvements focused on enhancing the user experience by addressing visual inconsistencies, improving comment readability, and refining the comment moderation process.

newFeatures: Your profile page has a completely new look.
The way you vote on comments is improved with a clearer voting bar.
You can now add custom backgrounds to your profile.
A button was added to easily access the RateMinistère Discord community.
improvements: The website loads faster.
Problems with displaying badges were fixed.
The overall look of the website was updated to be more modern.
changelog.why: This update aimed to increase user engagement with a redesigned profile page, better comment voting, and profile customization.  Overall site speed and aesthetics were also prioritized.

newFeatures: The "AstrArena" (a student competition page) got a visual makeover, but the buttons don't work yet.
The "School Page" also got a new look, but its features are still being added.
improvements: The website works better on mobile phones.
changelog.why: Work began on major new features, AstrArena and School Pages, with an initial focus on visual design.  Mobile responsiveness continued to be improved.

newFeatures: The AstrArena page was completely redesigned to look like a game, with a cool background and a better leaderboard.
You can now edit and delete your comments, and there's a new way to view them.
You can now vote on schools, and the school pages look better.
A new "Crew" section was added so you can learn about the people who made RateMinistère.
improvements: The mouse pointer is now customized.
Teacher information cards look better.
School pages are laid out more nicely.
Better experience on mobile: You'll feel a slight vibration when you tap, and things respond better to touch.
Fixed various problems that made the website unstable, inconsistent, or slow.
changelog.why: This was a significant update. AstrArena was fully redesigned, core comment management was added, school pages were improved, and the overall user experience was enhanced through UI customizations, mobile improvements, and bug fixes.

improvements: Fixed the "robot check" that appears when you sign up.
Fixed the signup button on mobile phones.
Made it clearer when you click a button on the top navigation bar.
Fixed a button in AstrArena that used to bounce twice.
Cleaned up some unnecessary visual elements in AstrArena.
Made buttons on the profile page look nicer.
Fixed how the AstrArena leaderboard looks.
changelog.why: This was a bug-fixing release, addressing issues with signup, navigation, and the AstrArena, directly improving user flow and interaction.

newFeatures: All the policy pages (like terms of service) now look the same, and there's a back button.
Some text on the website has a cool 3D effect, and the buttons on the top navigation bar also have a 3D hover effect.
Pop-up windows now have a fun, game-like animation.
You can see a preview of a game being added to AstrArena.
You can now reply to comments, and you can upvote or downvote replies.
improvements: Fixed how comments on school page looks.
Website work better on Dark mode and Mobile.
Your username will be the same with your profile name.
changelog.why: This update focused on improving user interaction and visual appeal, adding features like comment replies and enhanced styling, while maintaining consistency across the site.

improvements: Fixed some visual problems and how Dark mode works.
Fixed some translation errors.
Clarified the website's mission: to help students get better grades.
changelog.why: This release addressed visual and translation inconsistencies and explicitly reinforced the website's core mission.

newFeatures: The search bar looks nicer and has a toggle button.
A list of schools was added to make it easier to find yours.
improvements: The font was updated to look cleaner and more modern.
Fixed some problems with the AstrArena preview.
changelog.why: Search and school browsing were improved to make it easier for users to find what they need.  The font update improved readability and site aesthetics.

newFeatures: Improved the practice area in AstrArena.
Improved the system for earning points.
Made the school pages more detailed and easier to use.
Added new icons and badges for teacher competitions.
Made the search bar animation smoother.
Improved the bell notifications to show snippets of popular comments.
You can now upvote and downvote comments on school pages, just like you can for teacher comments.
Added a "Watch Out" section for teachers (the button is still being worked on).
Added a helpful "i" button that explains how to rate teachers.
Your points now show up on your profile.
changelog.why: This was a large feature-focused update.  AstrArena, school pages, and the points system were all significantly improved, and new features were added to enhance user engagement and provide helpful information.

improvements: Added a smooth animation to the Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) section.
changelog.why: A small enhancement to improve the user experience within the FAQ section.

improvements: Fixed the translation in the signup window.
Made pop-up windows appear more smoothly.
Fixed the window that asks if you're sure you want to delete your profile.
Added a message on your profile to remind you to leave a comment if you rated a teacher.
Fixed how comments and replies respond when you move your mouse over them.
changelog.why: This update addressed various bugs related to translation, UI interactions, and user profile management, improving overall usability.

newFeatures: You can now report comments or replies that are inappropriate.
A new button in your notifications lets you mark all notifications as read.
The website keeps track of your last 10 notifications.
improvements: Made the little information boxes that appear when you hover over buttons look better.
Fixed a problem that showed the same message twice when you voted on a school comment.
Made the guidelines for rating clearer and more interesting.
Made the FAQ tutorial open in a new tab so it's easier to navigate.
changelog.why: New features were added to improve community moderation (reporting) and notification management.  Usability was improved through better tooltips, clearer guidelines, and improved FAQ access.

newFeatures: Split Screen Button: allowing to compare two section easily!
Dynamic Profile Loading: You will see a spinning circle while your profile load.
Point History Page: You point history will open in a new page
improvements: Fixed problems with displaying tooltips.
Fixed glitchs in buttons' style.
Fixed a serious bug which prevent user upvote teachers.
changelog.why: Major new features, including split-screen comparison, dynamic profile loading, and a dedicated points history page, were introduced. Several bugs, including a critical voting issue, were also resolved.

newFeatures: Changelog Page: After testing 16 different styles, we finally have a clean and functional changelog!
Improved Compare Button: Better logic and a sleeker design for effortless comparisons.
Profile Page Enhancements: Improved tutorial button and added a direct link to the changelog.
changelog.why: This update introduced a dedicated changelog for better transparency, enhanced the compare feature for improved usability, and made it easier for users to access help and updates from their profile page.

newFeatures: Compare button is fixed and no longer freezes.
Usernames and icons now appear beside comments. New users get random usernames (changeable later), and existing users remain anonymous if preferred.
You can now toggle detailed criteria for comment votes.
Profile page translations have been improved.
Replies to comments are now displayed correctly.
Improved animations, font colors, and dark mode compatibility across the site.
improvements: Refined mobile styles in the teacher all comments modal
Smoother and more intuitive navigation bar
changelog.why: This update focused on improving user experience with a more stable compare feature, clearer comment attribution, enhanced profile page, and numerous visual and functional improvements across desktop and mobile.
